The usage of ColorUI is very simple, the Demo is in the source code, so although someone in the group has been calling for the author to write a document, I think it shouldn’t be necessary to write it except for a custom tabBar, right? The entire source code is in two folders template and demo

How ​​to view the demo: First create an empty small program by yourself, delete all the files except project.config.json in the path, and then delete the demo folder except project.config.json Copy all the content in the applet path, just open the WeChat developer tool directly, all the implementations are in it, just copy the style you like.

If you need to quote in an existing applet:

  1. You need to copy the two files colorui.wxss and icon.wxss to the root directory of your mini program. If you enable cloud development, it is under miniprogram

  1. Add references in app.wxss
  1. Just copy which wxml you like, don’t care about the wxss in the page

Description of custom tabBar

What needs to be said is Custom tabBar. The author added a custom tabBar in version 2.0.5. However, the official WeChat official support for custom base library version is 2.5 or more, so setting a custom tabBar needs to be carefully considered. If you are sure to use it, then it is also divided into two steps:

-First, you need to copy the custom-tab-bar folder in the demo package into the root directory of the applet, which is the same level directory as app.json
-Then add “custom”: true in the “tabBar” section of app.json

The custom tarBar can be opened at this time, and subsequent tarBar maintenance and changes should be configured in the custom-tab-bar folder, not in the app.json, here is Amway, because By using a custom tarBar, our tarBar can achieve a transparent effect. At the same time, the icon can directly use font icons instead of 81px pictures. The demo still uses pictures. You can refer to the writing of the two files below.

index.js

index.wxml

Use html2wxml plugin for html page rendering

Because we use a small program to display the content of the API article, the content passed is in html format. At this time, the html2wxml plug-in is needed to convert the html file to the wxml file format and present it, which can be searched directly in the background of the small program html2wxml rich text component and opened in the background of the mini program![](https://i.loli.net/2021/ 03/29/zSDuEBMLj513VH2.png)

Make the plug-in declaration in app.json:

Then register as follows in the json file of the required page:

Finally, use it directly in the wxml file that needs the page, and inject the content of the html file into the tag:

Finally, take a look at the rendering effect:

entry.title: Talk about Docker
entry.content:
Wedge

The first time I heard about the term Docker was around 2014. At that time, the research was not in-depth, and the introduction and application of new technologies in non-Internet companies were often lagging (not not innovating, but in safety and stability. consider). At that time, I just knew that the simplest explanation of Docker was application and virtualization. There were very few domestic applications, and the mirror warehouse was far less mature than it is now.

But I think the main reason for the slow promotion may be two other reasons:

  1. The mainstream discussion of enterprise-level application changes that year was SOA (Service-Oriented Architecture). In actual scenarios, everyone is studying Dubbo. Although the concept of microservices already exists, the boundary and application are split. The case is not clear
  2. The entrance to the Spring Family Bucket Spring Boot** just came out, not to mention the Spring Cloud

Over time, after picking up the technology again, I found that Spring Boot 2.X has been powerful enough, and Spring’s official website has announced very clearly and proudly. The future development trend of the Java web project is the following picture Build Anything | Coordinate Anything | Connect Everything:

The future is here. In addition to simple additions, deletions, changes, and checks, the code builder can already configure and automatically generate forms through the application of the template engine. ** Is the era for robots to automatically complete the architecture and business implementation still far away? **Maybe 80% of developers will be laid off in the future, who knows?

It’s a bit far-flung. When it comes to Docker, I want to say as little as possible about theoretical knowledge. Baidu is everywhere, and there are various video tutorials. Here, I will just talk about the application of Docker and the most commonly used commands.

What is Docker

This paragraph is copied from the Docker official website:

Docker uses the Go language launched by Google for development and implementation, based on the Linux kernel cgroup, namespace , and [Union FS](https://en.wikipedia .org/wiki/Union_mount) and other technologies, which encapsulate and isolate processes, belong to operating system level virtualization technology. Since the isolated process is independent of the host and other isolated processes, it is also called a container. The initial implementation is based on LXC. Since version 0.7, LXC has been removed and the self-developed [libcontainer](https://github.com/docker/ libcontainer), starting from 1.11, it further evolved to use runC and containerd.

Docker has carried out further encapsulation on the basis of containers, from file system, network interconnection to process isolation, etc., which greatly simplifies the creation and maintenance of containers. This makes Docker technology more portable and faster than virtual machine technology.

It’s too complicated to understand, isn’t it? A simple example to illustrate, in the past, what was the process for software companies to release products to customers for deployment and launch?

  1. Developers complete the development, package and submit for testing
  2. Testers set up a test environment for testing, and return to development if there are bugs
  3. The developer will verify the bug, if it can be reproduced, modify the bug and resubmit the test
  4. If developers cannot reproduce, they need to communicate with testers to confirm and investigate environmental factors (generally this cycle will be very scary)
  5. After the test is completed, the developer will package the version and submit it to the on-site implementation staff
  6. The implementer gets the package** and deploys the UAT environment**, submits it for user testing after deployment, and returns to the implementer if there is a bug
  7. The implementer needs to check: user operation**, deployment process, UAT environment and other factors**, if it cannot be resolved, then return to the developer for verification
  8. The developer verifies, if the bug can be reproduced, modify the bug, and repeat steps 4, 5, 6
  9. The implementer deploys to the production environment and conducts the final test. If there is a bug, repeat steps 7 and 8

It can be seen that in the entire software life cycle, environment deployment and environment inconsistency will cause big problems. Docker solves this problem perfectly. If Docker is used in the entire process, the process will be greatly simplified, such as:

  1. The developer completes the development and marks as a Docker image to submit for testing
  2. The tester starts the mirror for testing, and returns to development if there is a bug
  3. The developer verifies the bug, if it can be reproduced, modify the bug and resubmit the test (after having Docker, if the developer follows the test procedure, 99% of the problem can be reproduced)
  4. After the test is completed, the developer marks it as a Docker image and submits it to the on-site implementation staff
  5. The implementer starts the mirror, the user conducts a UAT test, and returns to the implementer if there is a bug
  6. The implementer needs to check: user operation (99% of the problems are improper user operation or insufficient test case coverage by the tester after Docker is available). If it cannot be solved, return it to the developer for verification
  7. The developer verifies, if the bug can be reproduced, modify the bug, and repeat steps 4, 5, 6
  8. The implementer starts the mirror and performs the final test. If there is a bug, repeat steps 7 and 8

**Docker’s external slogan is: once package, run everywhere, and the operating environment is exactly the same. **When you finish the development, you package Tomcat, Java environment and web application into an image for packaging, then this image can be copied everywhere, as long as the machine equipped with Docker can extract the image and ** run directly and packaged with you For an application with the same environment, databases, middleware, and Web applications can all be mirrored. **

More importantly, compared with traditional virtual machines:

  1. Docker starts in seconds
  2. Docker’s disk usage is MB
  3. Docker’s performance is close to native
  4. Docker’s single machine supports thousands of containers

Install Docker

Install Docker under Mac OS

Installing Docker under Mac OS is very simple. After registering on the official website directly click on Get Docker to download the installation file. However, for some well-known reasons, if you want to extract mirrors elegantly, you also need to configure Registry mirrors.

https://registry.docker-cn.com

Install Docker under CentOS

Installing Docker under CentOS is equally simple, but you need to determine the kernel version first. Docker requires the kernel version of the CentOS system to be higher than 3.10

  1. First check the kernel version

​ uname -r

  1. Download and install, here you need to pay attention, after March 2017, docker is divided into two branch versions on the original basis: Docker CE and Docker EE. Docker CE is the community free version, and Docker EE is the enterprise version. It emphasizes security, but it needs to be used for a fee.

    Install some necessary system tools, yum-util provides the yum-config-manager function, and the other two are dependent on the devicemapper driver:

    sudo yum install -y yum-utils device-mapper-persistent-data lvm2

    Because of some well-known reasons, you need to set up a domestic yum source:

    sudo yum-config-manager --add-repo http://mirrors.aliyun.com/docker-ce/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo

    Update yum cache:

    sudo yum makecache fast

    Install Docker:

    sudo yum -y install docker-ce

    Start Docker service:

    sudo systemctl start docker

Install Docker under Windows

Oh, ha ha, ha ha ha, ha ha ha, ha ha ha ha, ha ha ha ha ha

Use of Docker

If it is only used normally, the commands that need to be understood are very limited, the most commonly used are the following five

List the mirror list

Use docker images to list the images on the local host

Find mirror

Use the docker search [mirror name] command to search for mirrors, such as searching for the mirrors I packaged

When searching, you can either directly search for the mirror name, or search the author name/mirror name, it will be sorted by the number of STARS, and OFFICIAL indicates that it is an official mirror.

Get a new mirror

Use the docker pull [image name] command to get the image

If there is no version number, the latest version of the mirror will be downloaded automatically, or if you know the name of the mirror specifically, you can directly use docker run [mirror name] This time the warehouse will automatically pull if there is no such mirror.

Delete mirror

Use the docker image rm [IMAGE ID] command to delete the image, such as deleting the image obtained above

Run the mirror

Use the docker run [mirror name] command to start the mirror. It is not recommended to use it directly here, because in general, you need to configure the port mapping and disk mapping between the host and the mirror when starting up. It is recommended to use **Dockerfile ** to run, put it in the Docker build and talk about it together

View the running status of the mirror

Use the docker stats command to view the running status of the image

My cloud server is 2C4G. It can be seen that the operation of the container is very refined. After all, it is poor!

Docker build

Dockerfile

In another sentence, Dockerfile can be understood as a BAT file on Windows (but there are still differences in fact), which can be regarded as a set of dockerfile configuration statements executed sequentially, but since it is said that Docker builds, it needs to be said briefly. The composition of Docker, theoretical knowledge is not mentioned, to understand it this way, the composition of Docker is like an onion, layer by layer, the core is the original container, it can be empty, or it can be a basic Java environment , Just like the picture below

This leads to the first command of the Dockerfile

FROM, specify the base image, for example, it can be written as FROM java:8, this is the version that specifies the base image as java and tag is 8, corresponding to jdk is 1.8

EXPOSE, specify the mirror port number, for example, it can be written as EXPOSE 8080, indicating that the external port of this mirror is 8080

VOLUME, specify the folder for data persistence. **It should be highlighted here that docker mirroring runs like redis. Once the mirroring stops, any data changes that occur inside will not be saved! ! ! Therefore, you need to specify a folder, this folder is mapped to the host, and all the data that needs to be saved should be placed in this folder! ! ! **This can be written as VOLUME /tmp, because the default working directory of the embedded Tomcat container used by Spring Boot is /tmp

ADD, put the content of the specified path into the specified path of the mirror, this is mainly used to throw the packaged web file into the mirrored web container, such as this sentence ADD jmall-admin.jar /app.jar It will throw my packaged Spring Boot file into the root directory of the container and rename it to app.jar

RUN, this is easy to understand, is to execute the docker command, corresponding to the above docker run

ENTRYPOINT, specify the default entry point of the mirror, such as ENTRYPOINT ["java","-jar","/app.jar"], this is particularly familiar java -jar /app.jar

At this point, a Dockerfile command is finished, and it looks like this:

Use Dockerfile

Using Dockerfile is very simple. The easiest way is to go directly to the directory at the same level of Dockerfile and run the command docker build directly. The created image will be directly placed in your local warehouse. You can use the docker images command to view

Submit your mirror

After the image is done, you can directly submit the image file to the private server or docker hub to share with others. Submitting the image is also very simple. I submitted it directly with IDEA. If it is on the server, you can also use the command

First log in to docker hub

docker login

After pressing enter, you will be asked to enter your username and password

You can submit it when you see Login Succeeded, docker push wellmoonloft/jmall here needs attention, your name in the front must be the same as your login user name, and due to well-known reasons… The submission process is very long, so it is strongly recommended to submit it with a tool, at least there is a progress bar to see.

Save the image as a file and copy it to others

Sometimes the image that we packaged belongs to the internal system, which is not convenient to push to the public network, or if our company does not have a private server, we need to save the image to others as a tar file and copy it to others. The image storage is also very simple. Command docker save -o [file name to be saved] [image file to be saved or IMAGE ID], after completion, there will be a tar package in the path where you execute the command, this package can be directly copied to others. It should be noted that if it is Cent OS or Mac OS, pay attention to the authorization of the path

Import the image into the local warehouse

You can’t directly use the mirrored tar file you received from others. You need to import it into your local warehouse. It’s also very simple. Execute the command docker load <[file name], corresponding to the above file, you should write docker load < jmall.tar

Docker Compose

If you just run a simple single application, this is enough, but in production, multiple applications often work together to complete the construction of a system. If you add load balancing, you may have to start or stop multiple mirrors at the same time. And unified management, there is a very useful mechanism in Docker called Docker Compose to solve this problem, here we need to introduce two familiar terms.

-Service (service): a single container image, which can be a database or a web application
-Project (project): A complete business unit composed of a set of associated application containers (service)

Don’t talk about concepts, look at examples:

version: '2' This is not just scribbled, this version is the version of Docker Compose installed on the host

services is a fixed wording, indicating that the following are all mirror images

The name of the jmall-adminservice, which corresponds to the image name in the following image

ports, the mirror port is specified as 8080 when building the mirror, but in fact it cannot be accessed when the mirror is run directly, because the port thrown by the mirror is not mapped with the host port , Here is to map the 8080 of the host machine to the 8080 in the image, of course, if you don’t use Docker Compose, you can also directly map it with docker run -p 8080:8080

environment is to force the content of the Spring Boot configuration file to be changed, here I am writing to specify the development environment

Use Docker Compose

It is also very simple to use Dokcer Compose. Enter the same level path of Dokcer Compose and use the command docker-compose up

Thinking

Technological progress is truly endless, and it is very closely related. If microservices do not have Spring Boot, Docker, Dubbo, Zookeeper, and Redis technologies, it is really difficult to fully promote it through traditional products. +The form of service is difficult to survive, the market forces technology to open source, and China’s open source industry is becoming more and more mature. Open source does not mean free, but ** learn from each other and support each other, and work together to find the best case. Practice, this is a virtuous circle. **

The future of technology must not be closed, but a combination of technology + packaging services.

With the emergence of Gitee, there are now more and more excellent domestic open source products, such as JFinal, xxl-sso, jeesite, which are either independently developed or developed by small teams.

And big manufacturers are also embracing open source. Needless to say, the domestic gods who contributed various national services, launched various open source products such as Dubbo, and the conscientious Ali of the industry, various technologies are promoted by the Tucao policy, but at least one echarts can still I saw that Baidu, an Internet company, was barely able to catch up with a Tencent that studied various charging methods.

It is so wonderful to be able to catch up with this era.

entry.title: To my own youth and frivolous
entry.content:
Wedge

Young and frivolous, extremely arrogant

The above eight words are for the past self.

In fact, this is a very irresponsible hat. It seems to attribute all the mistakes I have made to my youth and frivolousness. People are selfish in nature. It seems that the four most empty monks have the most selfish obsession to become a Buddha on the ground. The ultimate goal of Taoism’s purity and inaction is also the hope that one day, one day, soaring.

Admitting one’s own mistakes is not easy for emperors, and it is still not easy for ordinary people.

Speaking of Emperor Han Wu, there are many achievements evaluated by later generations:

  • Unify the mind, oust hundreds of schools, and establish a spiritual emperor nationwide (for thousands of years, the only non-religious way of governing people’s hearts through the spiritual level in the world )
  • The official management of salt and iron and strategic materials are unified at the national level (today, salt and iron tea, etc. are still mainly controlled by the government and state-owned enterprises)
  • Xing Taixue, set up a master, to raise the world’s people (for the Han Wu’s three questions about the heavens and the people, you can write a separate article to praise this)
  • Expansion of territories, Nanping and Vietnam, the Northern Expedition of the Huns, the management of the Western Regions, the Tongnanyi, and Dongding Korea established an unprecedentedly vast territory and laid the territory of China ( Those who violate the strong Han will be punishable even if they are far away )
  • Opened up the Hexi Corridor, opened the Silk Road, and developed the economic and cultural exchanges between China and the West

When mentioning the six great achievements of Emperor Wu of the Han Dynasty, the most impressive thing is not the ones above, but the last feat of Emperor Wu of the Han Dynasty in his later years after completing such a feat.

In the four years of Zhenghe (89 years ago), Emperor Wu of the Han Dynasty announced to the world that he had caused pain to the people, and he would no longer use military forces, labor the people and money, and even confess his inner remorse. This is the “Lun Tai Sin Ji Zhao”. This edict is the first edict to sin against oneself in Chinese history.

Dare to sin against oneself, put oneself at the center of public opinion, Han Wudi is undoubtedly the first person! At this point, under the influence of Emperor Wu of the Han Dynasty as a “example”, the emperors of the next generation made big mistakes, and they would also “punish themselves”, publicly confess their mistakes, and show the posture of Mingjun.

This is also a place where it is recognized that there is a gap between Emperor Qin, Taizu and Hanwu, but considering that Emperor Qin and Taizu are all Emperors of the Kai Dynasty, the hearts of the people are undecided, maybe it is not that I don’t want to “sin oneself” but that I cannot “Sin on oneself” **.

文启

I recently read an article that an old leader liked and talked about because this old leader has not broken contact after leaving his post, so it can affect me all the time. What he gave me the last time I met:

You always can’t get used to these people and things, but you don’t find the reasons for yourself. In fact, you are the most selfish person, but you don’t know it yourself.

This sentence has affected me for a whole year and a half, and it continues to affect me, so that I can continue to “cultivation of internal strength” and become “qualified” to blame myself Those who can’t understand and those things.

As the years grow older, it turns out that the way he described how we behave and the truths are correct, but I didn’t understand it at the time. When the bubble was really burst, it was a real gratitude. The man willing to pierce it.

Neurolinguistic Programming

NLP proposed in the article refers to neurolinguistic programming.

It is not the same as NLP of the AI ​​research branch. The latter is natural language processing, which uses statistics, speculation, and probability to identify Highly ambiguous sentences, providing semantic confirmation for artificial intelligence robots. Here, I can write a separate article to talk about AliceBot that was studied in 2016. At present, AliceBot’s official website is no longer available. , The best practice of AIML language has been fully transferred to Python, as a obsessive Java dog, um.

Neurolinguistic programming comprehension six levels:

We can divide our understanding of a thing into 6 different levels, and this level is divided into high and low. If you look at a problem from a low-dimensional perspective, it may not be possible to solve it, but when you look at it from a higher dimension, it may become a very simple problem. This is why people’s positions are high and low. Minute. It does not mean that there is a gap between people themselves, but that there are differences in the way and method of looking at and dealing with problems.

After flexibly mastering the six levels of NLP understanding, it can be used in almost every aspect of life, such as how to cooperate with colleagues at work, how to get along with family in life, how to make life plans for yourself, and so on.

**Our brain has six different levels of measurement to deal with things and problems, called the level of understanding. **

  1. **System/Meaning/Mission: **The relationship between myself and various people and things in the world (the meaning of life)

  2. **Identity: **I have any identity to realize the meaning of life (who am I, what kind of life do I have)

  3. ** Beliefs/Regulations/Values: ** What kind of beliefs and values ​​should be associated with this identity (how should it be, what is important)

  4. Ability: What different options can I choose? What abilities do I have mastered and still need to master? (How to do it, will it do it?)

  5. **Behavior: **The process of what we do in the environment (what to do, whether to do it)

  6. **Environment: ** External conditions and obstacles. (Time, place, person)

Case

Suppose you are operating a commercial project, which is located in the core area of ​​Shanghai and is located in a cultural protection building complex. Since its full opening, the industry’s reputation, sales, and customer base structure have stabilized.

However, there are still various problems in terms of traffic, customer groups, and expansion of in-store memberships.

Traffic in the old city is very congested, and parking spaces are very tight. If the target group is tourist and student, it is okay. If the target group is positioned as the middle class, they will basically choose to travel by car. Transportation and parking are the first choices.

The project is located in a tourist area. When the tourist season comes, the distribution of the customer group in the venue will be more or less affected by the tourist group. The choice of this part of the customer group is also a big problem. If you strive for it, it must be targeted. If you don’t want to adjust the distribution of stores, then this part of the passenger flow will be wasted.

Do members who visit the store do business? If they do, the most effective way to solicit customers according to the traditional model is to give profits. However, because the parent company is not a capital operation company, but a traditional asset-holding company, it is impossible to increase investment. If the return route is not done, how to increase the high-viscosity, high-consumption loyal customer base in the project when the core area has a ceiling for the flow of people? What should I do at this time?

Different people think about the same problem in different ways:

Some people will say

“Traffic chaos in the old city is the cause of the government. It should be brought to the government and resolved in a unified manner. If the government does not act, then we have no choice but to let it go.”

“Since you are in a tourist area, why not be a tourist group? The introduction of some Shanghai Chenghuang Temple snacks can make money, so why do you have to adjust the structure of the customer group without thanking you?”

“How to solicit customers without taking advantage of the route? Isn’t this nonsense?”

Or someone will say

“You can meet the parking problem of the project to the greatest extent possible through the way of neighborhood symbiosis, while focusing on solving the parking problem of surrounding residents, which not only solves the problem of the government, but also solves the problem of the project”

“Because the project is located in the north of the Yangtze River, the low and peak tourist seasons are very obvious. If the store adjustments are completely tailored to the tourist groups, then the sales in the peak tourist seasons will not be able to supplement the off-season sales. Therefore, it is necessary to abandon the tourist groups to form a joint effort. And adjust the target audience”

“If you can’t let profit, I just pull one by one, 20 people a week, don’t be greedy, I can pull 500 a year! Abandon the number of members completely, do not follow the path of profitability, and build a small but precise high-viscosity membership circle”

**Why are everyone’s reactions and solutions so different when faced with the same dilemma? **

**Some people complain about the environment, some people become hardworking? **

**Some people are very hardworking, but with little success? **

**What should be done right? How to think and act? **

At this time, you need to use “NLP Understanding Level” to explain these issues:

NLP (Neuro-Linguistic Programming) is a science founded by Richard Bandler and John Grind in 1976, former US President Clinton, Microsoft leader Bill Gates, great director Spielberg and many other worlds Celebrities have received NLP training. 60% of the world’s top 500 companies use NLP to train their employees. The level of understanding is a core concept in NLP.

In this world, when everyone thinks, they will always give a certain meaning to this question based on their own interests. Since the meaning assigned to each person will be different, our understanding will be different, and our understanding will be different. The solution will of course be different.

“NLP level of understanding” says that the understanding of a thing can be divided into six different levels. There is no high or low level of the person who handles it, but this level of understanding is different. If you look at this problem from a low-dimensional perspective, it feels like it cannot be solved. **But when you look at it from a higher dimension, it may become a very simple problem, and even the problem itself has disappeared. **Like the era of horse-drawn carriages, everyone was looking for faster horses, but when the automobile was invented, this problem disappeared.

According to the different “levels of understanding” each person is in, society divides people into 6 different types from the bottom up. The higher the level of understanding, the stronger the ability to solve problems.

The sixth floor environment

What is the environment? Everything except yourself is considered the environment: people around you, leaders, colleagues, competitors, market environment, weather, public opinion… and so on.

More than 60% of people in society are at this level. People at this level of understanding, when a problem occurs, **he will first attribute the problem to “because of a bad environment.” **

such as:

The work is not going well because the leader is stupid X

There is no promotion opportunity because the company’s office politics is serious and there is no good promotion mechanism

The house is too expensive to buy, all because of the unscrupulous real estate speculators, the inability of the government to regulate and control, and no rich dad

In short, the current predicament that has occurred is not my problem, other people’s problems, the company’s problems, the market’s problems, the government’s problems, and the luck. It’s all because of my bad life. I was born. In such an era, I met such a group of people.

**And when he finds a solution, he will also think from the perspective of changing the environment. **

For example, in the case:

“How do you solicit customers if you don’t take the route of concession? Isn’t this nonsense? I can’t stay in this place anymore. Let’s go as soon as possible.”

Many people, including myself, often feel this “full of negative energy”, feeling that the misfortunes in this world have been met by them by chance. The fate is ill-fated, and life cannot continue in minutes. . This kind of behavior is called “complaining”, but the complaining person seems to know that complaining is bad? But why keep complaining?

That’s because the level of understanding is at the lowest “environmental level”, and the understanding of the world is stuck at this level. The is not to complain, but in the eyes of this level, in addition to seeing the environment , And can’t see the others anymore.

Therefore, the best way that people who are trapped in the fifth layer can think of is to change to a better environment. If they can improve one level, they may try to “act first” and pay. Strive to reach the goal.

Fifth layer behavior

If you want to solve the problem, you can’t change the environment, only you can change! Many success studies will say: **Why haven’t you succeeded? It’s because you haven’t worked hard enough! If you don’t change, how will the environment change? If you do not act, how can the environment be improved? **

People at this level of understanding, when a problem occurs, **the will first attribute the problem to “because my efforts are not enough”. **

such as:

Income is too low? Because I haven’t worked hard enough.

Can’t afford a house? It’s because I haven’t worked hard enough.

The business failed? It’s because I haven’t worked hard enough.

Although the solution of the problem is not entirely action, but at least action has the possibility of solving the problem. We often hear a sentence, **”Genius is created by 99% of sweat and 1% of hard work” **, but in my opinion, **hard work is indeed a necessary condition for success, but far Not a sufficient condition. **

From Shanghai to Beijing:

No matter how hard you go, it will take half a month

And if you drive, it only takes one day

If you fly by plane, it only takes two hours

**Actually, it seems that people who fly by plane are far less difficult than those who walk, but the value created and cost saved are indeed far behind. Why? The solution of the problem cannot be accomplished by “effort” alone. What are the important factors behind it? **

The fourth layer of ability

As mentioned above, people who walk to Beijing work harder than people who fly, but the value created is very low. Why? This is the difference in ability. Some people may question it. This is obviously the reason for the different means of transportation. What does it have to do with ability?

**What is ability? It means that you can solve the same problem in a simpler and more efficient way, quickly make a perfect implementation plan and quickly implement the plan. **

For people who are at the “ability” level of understanding, when a problem occurs, the problem will first be attributed to “because of my lack of ability.” Therefore, they will also look for better “methods” to solve problems at the “ability” level. **

For example, in the above case:

“If you can’t let profit, I just pull one by one, 20 people a week, don’t be greedy, I can pull 500 a year! Abandon the number of members completely, do not follow the path of profitability, and build a small but precise high-viscosity membership circle”

When you take the step of recruiting new members without various welfare conditions and no support, you will from the sixth layer to the fifth layer, and when you choose to give up the quantity and concentrate When the power becomes a precise target member of a wavelet, you will step into the fourth layer.

No problem exists in isolation. Someone must have encountered it before and has a better solution, but I don’t know yet. I should learn more in the industry. Look at other people’s success stories. Maybe it’s not a 100% match. But as long as he understands that his solution is to succeed, even if his own step is just the basic skills of others.

**If you can reach this level, with both the diligent efforts of the “behavior level” and the methods and routines of the “capability level”, you will generally be able to become a middle-level company in the company. **Common problems can no longer trouble you, you can always find a way to solve them. Of course, each level of improvement mentioned here does not mean that you do not need to go to the next level. For example, if you have a method, you don’t need to work hard, but you have raised a level of thinking on the original basis. Otherwise, it will become a castle in the air, talking on paper.

**So, is it possible that both efforts have been made, learning has been carried out, and an implementation plan has been made, but is there still a problem that cannot be solved? ** The level of understanding of “ability” is the highest level that our “consciousness” can think of. Going further up, we will enter our “subconscious” area, and the content will become more vague.

In fact, it’s a very simple sentence **If you have worked hard, studied, and made an implementation plan, but still cannot solve the problem, it is the wrong choice of the problem point. The selection of the problem point usually involves the company’s strategy. Direction, how to improve the ability to make strategic decisions, needs to be applied to the third level of understanding. **

The third layer of beliefs/rules/values

Following the above, if you can reach this level, you can generally become a senior in the company. “Ability layer” is the ability to choose specific problems, and “BVR layer” is the ability to make direction choices, **what can be done, what can not be done, what is more important, and what can be ignored Regardless of? **

Understand that “BVR layer” is a necessary ability to become a senior company.

**B (Believe): Belief, what do you believe is right? **

In Journey to the West, although Monkey King is strong, he is not firm in what he does. He always does things for three minutes. If Monkey King is a leader, as a leader, you will run away when you see difficulties, not to mention the people you lead. To say that Tang Seng has more than Monkey King, it is faith. **

He often provokes monsters but doesn’t have the ability to fight monsters. Even so, Tang Seng dares to say: You can all go, I will go to the Western Heaven to learn the scriptures. This is why Tang Seng is better than Monkey King.

**V (Value): Values, which one do you think is more important, A or B? **

Still in Journey to the West, although Zhu Bajie is not as capable as Monkey King, his abilities are also outstanding. But Zhu Bajie is very selfish. Xiaofu Jian just wants to live a comfortable life and enjoy everyday life, without the spirit of dedication to others. If Zhu Bajie is the leader, can the four of them still go to the West to learn the scriptures? What Tang Seng has more than Zhu Bajie is the value.

In our hearts, there will be a certain value for everyone, everything, and every concept. When things are different, the value will be high and low, and everyone’s standards will be different. Eventually we will form our own value ranking, which is your values. Therefore, when there is an A/B choice, choose the one that we think is more valuable. For Zhu Bajie, there are many things in the world that are far more valuable than learning the scriptures, and only Tang Seng, no matter what problems arise, **For him, the value of learning from scriptures is more than anything else. **

**R (Rule): rules, principles of doing things. **

It is still Journey to the West. Although the Drifting monk is not as capable as the Senior Brother and the Second Senior Brother, his ability is also remarkable, and his ability to remove the demon and defend the way is far stronger than Tang Seng. If the Drifting is the leader, can the four of them really get back the truth? To say that Tang Seng has more than Drifting, that is the rules.

When the four masters and apprentices went to a place, Tang Seng began to order these apprentices, one to alms, one to feed the white dragon horse, and one to explore the way ahead. Give full play to everyone’s strengths. Although Tang Seng is very “incompetent”, he knows how to use people, has a benevolent heart, and often interacts with people and has a good relationship with people. Therefore, Tang Seng can be a leader.

To sum up, the **”Ability” layer allows you to do things right, while the “BVR” layer helps you choose to do the right things. **

**People at the “BVR level”, when a problem occurs, first think about “Which is the most important problem?” and “Is there any more important problem that I haven’t seen?” People at the “ability” level are likely to scratch their beards and eyebrows, and solve problems when they encounter problems, like spreading a flatbread, adding more water to the noodles, and adding more water to the noodles. There seem to be endless ways to deal with it, but the problems have become more and more, and they will never be solved. **

The second level of identity

Basically being able to be in the “BVR layer” has reached the group of “high-end people” who are less than 20% of the society. The second level of understanding is “identity”. This is a very high level, and most people rarely can Answer the following question clearly, and those who have achieved high achievements are by no means proclaiming “I recognized the direction very early, I will do this”:

**Who am I and what do I want to do? **

In the early years, there was a movie called Initial D. Xia Shu told Takumi:

“The most important thing for people is to find their own world. As long as they find their own world, life is meaningful.

Takumi, since you like racing so much, I think racing is your world!”

**The reason why you sometimes don’t know how to choose, apart from being unclear about certain concepts, the most important thing is that you don’t know what kind of person you want to be. **

If you don’t know who you want to be, you don’t know what you want. If you don’t know what you want, you cannot make a choice. If you cannot make a choice, you will get nothing.

Usually when the identity is clearly defined, the answer comes out.

When you think about the position of “identity” that suits you, you should support the corresponding BVR around it, then build your competence circle, and make corresponding plans and actions, **you Will become the first-rate person in this profession. **

Actually, not everyone is suitable to be a hero. Successfully learns more and harms others. I often say that society is where all kinds of people with different identities perform their duties**, and society can develop. , ** Those who choose to be heroes will not work harder than those who choose to applaud the heroes, but are more suitable.

The first level system/meaning/mission

Above the “BVR layer”, there is a class of people. They are only a handful of people in the long river of human history. They create miracles, they change the world, they lead the times, and they can pursue ideals. Give up your life.

In society, there are often such descriptions of certain leaders:

Shennong, changed the primitive agriculture of human slash and burn

Qin Shihuang, the first to complete the unification of Chinese civilization and create the first multi-ethnic centralization

Emperor Wu of the Han Dynasty opened up territories and created a spiritual civilization that has affected China for two thousand years.

“Mission” level must be supported by “identity” level. In other words, if you are at the identity level and don’t know who you want to be, you can try to come to the “mission” level. Think about what you can do for this world? It can not be that big, even if it is only in one aspect, which can help a few people, what is that aspect? Maybe, this can become your life mission, and then think about what kind of identity can better help you accomplish this mission?

**Once I step into the “mission” level, I don’t know what language I can use to describe such great people. Only worship and admiration. Their names are like stars in the sky above mankind, shining on the progress of mankind. . **

Thinking

To sum up, the biggest problem of a person is not ability, but the inability to recognize one’s identity. Without ability, the problem will be left in place and cannot be solved. Wrong direction and wrong identity recognition will make you go further and further. far.

People have been searching for themselves and positioning themselves all their lives.

Looking back at the past, I was too lazy, worked, right, and missed. I had been wandering on the fifth and sixth floors before. Now I barely touched the entrance to the fourth floor. There is a long way to go and we can encourage each other.

entry.title: How to write articles with Typora
entry.content:
Wedge

If you want to do your job well, you must first sharpen your tools. As a non-decent programmer who wants code, you must not use IDEA or Sublime IDEs. The ancient Evernote can also be discarded. , Long-term non-support of Markdown is estimated to have indeed lost a lot of users.

Markdown is a markup language that can be written by a common text editor. Through simple markup syntax, it can make common text content have a certain format. The syntax format is very simple. Most people try all the syntax against the list for about ten times. You can get started in about a minute.

As for why use Markdown to code text? It should be said that the most annoying thing about code text is format and typesetting. The average writer has to be distracted while writing, not to say that it cannot be done, but it is very inefficient.

As a person with obsessive-compulsive disorder, seeing this chaotic typesetting, you will definitely be distracted. For example, there are two empty lines here, and the spacing of this paragraph should be reduced. When you are satisfied, your inspiration has disappeared. .

While writing the content, adjusting the format at the same time, with one mind and two purposes. I am very distracted. I just want to focus on the content. What should I do? At this time, there are two choices: 1. Regardless of the form, write to a pile, and then uniformly adjust after writing; 2. Without affecting the writing, add a few simple marks to make the layout of the article you write clearer. And in the future, various formats needed for editing can be generated. The second method is the birth of Markdwon grammar.

The above paragraph can be written like this

While writing the content, adjusting the format at the same time, with one mind and two purposes. I am very distracted. I just want to focus on the content. What should I do?

There are two options at this time:

-Regardless of the form, write to a pile, and then adjust it uniformly after writing;
-Without affecting the writing, by adding a few simple marks, the layout of the articles written by yourself can be made clearer, and various formats required by the editor can be generated in the future. The second method was born Markdwon grammar.

The format of the previous article was not born like this, but the need for paper printing. For example: a paragraph should have two characters blank, no blank lines between paragraphs, and direct quotations are all mixed in a paragraph. These are not for ease of reading, but for saving paper.

In the era of electronic reading, the space of the screen can be infinitely large when scrolling, but compared with paper, the screen hurts our eyes and makes us tired. Therefore, people need clearer typesetting, which is the meaning of Markdown.

##Typora

The choice is not entangled. Although there are many Markdown tools under Mac OS, there are only two that are easy to use. Mou is the most useful and developed by Chinese, but Because it is very popular, the developers thought carefully, announced the new version in advance, and opened a wide range of pre-orders. After a round of money, there will be no more. Currently, the latest version of Mac OS is not supported.

Later, someone in the open source world really couldn’t see it. He developed a new open source App that imitated the function and UI of Mou, which is MacDown, but the technology may not be mature yet. The reason is that MacDown often hangs up for a period of time and requires a forced restart before it can be used again. This is fatal to the programmer. At this time, Typora appeared. , It’s like someone driving a colorful auspicious cloud in the dark to save sentient beings.

Typora has a very high appearance. Unlike the traditional Markdown editor, it does not preview while writing, but what you see is what you get. Check it out on its official website and you will be immediately attracted.

By the way, Typora’s official website is also very good… Apple, that page is really worth seeing

In addition to the basic functions of Mou, Typora also supports many other functions, such as generating directories, syntax shortcuts, etc. It is full of charging temperament, but it is now free!

Take a look at the code display that programmers value most. It supports a variety of mainstream code displays. The following is javascript

The next step is to talk about the key points. When writing an article, especially when you need to publish the article to a blog, WeChat public account, short book, etc., you will encounter a problem, inserting pictures.

Insert picture

What should we do if we usually need to insert articles?

  1. Get the link address of the picture directly from the Internet as your own picture link (in case the link changes, the picture will not be displayed)
  2. The relative path of the direct local file (in case the blog needs to be shared, naturally others cannot see the picture)
  3. Upload the picture through another platform first, and then copy the link address (the operation is more troublesome)
  4. Of course, you can drag and drop files directly on the short book to the editing interface (but you need to save half of the writing, you always feel uneasy in the cloud)

The optimized solution is:

  1. Use Typora for code text
  2. Use Picture Bed to save pictures
  3. Write the picture address on the picture bed into Typora
  4. After the article is finished, directly copy and paste to the blog, WeChat official account, short book, etc.

It sounds like the steps are very cumbersome, but rest assured, some people have thought of these, so they have developed a picture bed artifact, which can upload pictures through drag and drop, shortcut keys, etc., and supports Weibo, Qiniu, Youpai, and Alibaba Cloud. , Imgur, Flickr, Amazon S3 and other image beds, automatically save Markdown format links, giving you an unprecedented illustration experience.

Re-optimized solution

  1. Use Typora for code text
  2. Copy the picture to the content
  3. After the article is finished, copy and paste it directly to the blog, WeChat official account, short book, etc.

**For example, after setting it up, it only took three seconds to insert the picture above. How do I do it? **

  1. command + control shift + 4 screenshot
  2. command + u upload screenshots to Qiniuyun’s image bed
  3. command + v Paste the syntax commands of Markdown into the article, and you are done!

Qiniu Cloud

Speaking of Qiniu Cloud, it can be regarded as a model of industry conscience. In the early days, it started as a video streaming cloud service. When I was in Shenzhen, I almost cooperated for their streaming media service.

At present, Qiniu Cloud’s object storage and fusion CDN are free as long as they are personally authenticated. Object storage is free of 10GB, uploading unlimited data, CDN’s monthly free data of 10G, and other cloud products are free for limited time Trial, once again emphasized is the conscience of the industry.

PS: There is 20G of free space for enterprise certification, which can be used by companies with tight funds.

Being able to reach the top ten in the cloud service industry, in addition to the technology leader, the vision and mind of the enterprise are more important, and those enterprises that are unable to take advantage of the disadvantages and stand still can only live under the protection of policies.

OK, back to the topic.

  1. Register Qiniu Cloud account
  2. Perform personal real-name authentication, and use Alipay with personal authentication to submit quickly (Ali-a socially responsible technical man)
  3. Create a new storage space
  4. Assign a domain name that is integrated with CDN (if you don’t have a domain name, you can use a temporary domain name, which will be updated every 30 days, so it is recommended to apply for a domain name. If you don’t have your own domain name these days, it’s not embarrassing to say that you are a programmer. Ah, the domain name you registered in Alibaba Cloud can also be used, just need to perform CNAME resolution)

Picture bed tool

Once you have free cloud storage space, you can save your pictures. But if you click upload on the web page every time, and then copy the link to the article, it would be too troublesome, so at this time we need a tool that can automatically upload pictures to our Qiniu cloud storage, and Save the picture address in the clipboard to simplify our operations.

It is also the domestic product image bed artifact IPic. Regardless of screenshots or copying pictures, you can automatically upload and save the link in Markdown format, and paste and insert directly, just like The animation below, drag the image and paste it into the article, it’s that simple, of course, it also supports uploading the image in the clipboard. Just like the two images above, I only need to configure one upload The shortcut keys will do.

but! Yes, but here comes, is such a useful tool free?

Of course not. If you are only for the image bed function, IPic uses Weibo image bed by default, which is a public image bed, and it is indeed usable. If you want to use your own private cloud storage, such as the one mentioned above Qiniu cloud storage, then you need to upgrade the paid version, 60 yuan a year.

It’s not expensive. As a supporter of open source developers, the money is indeed worth spending. The problem is that if it is a one-time buyout of 60 yuan, I think it is worth it. The annual fee is a bit unreasonable, and if you have two Macs , If one is at home and the other is in the company…you know that the hot indie game Taiwu Scroll on Steam is only 68 yuan for permanent use. The development cost of an independent game is of course not the same as that of a swift gadget. Language, but in any case, IPic is indeed the best of the current image bed tools on Mac OS.

The open source world is indeed a turbulent arena. Since some people think that your charges are unreasonable, then some people will jump out to challenge you. As for whether it is worth it or not, the world is in charge of things, [PicGo](https://github.com/Molunerfinn /PicGo/releases) was born in this way. It was developed by a front-end technician who is not familiar with Swift. Therefore, PicGo is implemented using Electron-vue as a development scaffold, which perfectly replicates most of the functions of IPic. , But due to commercial reasons, one of the most convenient functions PicGo cannot be realized, that is, drag the picture directly into Typora, it will trigger IPic to upload automatically and then replace the picture address with the picture bed address. I believe this is the result of the communication between the IPic author and the Typora development team.

The flaws are not concealed, as the author of PicGo wrote in his blog:

At present, PicGo is still a very young project. There are definitely a lot of bugs and lack of functions. So it needs to be continuously improved. I hope you can put forward any comments or suggestions in the process of using it in issues in the project repository~

Upload the article to WeChat official account

At present, the articles edited by Typora can be directly copied into MD and uploaded to the simple book and other places that support markdown syntax, but! The WeChat official account still does not support markdwon syntax. Fortunately, someone in the open source community has already completed this conversion tool, and it is more convenient to use:

Online-markdown This is the source code of the online conversion tool authored by little beard brother, you can Clone it directly and use it after npm install, or you can directly visit online address to use it. I recommend cloning to use it on this machine because there are many people who use it. Sometimes this webpage will get stuck. I encapsulated a Mac OS App with electron, which can be directly used by double-clicking it. It has been shared to Baidu Netdisk, password Yes: kjyh, welcome to download and use.

to sum up

Since 2014, I have always hoped to write something, but every time I turn over an earlier article, I retreat again. My personality is flawed and I am not persistent enough. Recently, there are too many trivial matters, but the code After the development is picked up, I can calm my mind during the development process, so I am very happy to pick up the technology, just like when I was in junior high school, I played the Legend of Jin Yong and the Legend of Sword and Fairy for the first time. Others may focus on the game. , But my gaze is in Heluo Studio.

What kind of great god can make such a game, and what is computer programming?

The times are advancing. When we were doing development, it only took two hours to configure a Java web development environment, plus the import of databases and jar packages.

Now, with Vue on the front end, Springboot on the back end, and template engine on the back end, various bases on the mobile end, as well as small program development SDKs and IDEs, development has become easier and easier, and you can concentrate on business implementation. Like code text, with Markdown syntax and this series of tools, life is really getting better and better.

It’s happier than many people. The technology I love can give me a bite of food, which is great.

OK, finally summarize the tools I used:

-Typora|The best Markdown editor for Mac OS currently
-Qiniu Cloud|The Unicorn of Free Cloud Storage
-IPic|Currently the best image bed tool in the industry
-PicGo|The best free alternative to IPic

entry.title: Beijing's snow
entry.content:
Beijing has been a long time
It has not snowed

Can you imagine
More than 7 million couples in Beijing are experiencing
Valentine’s day without snow
Christmas without snow
New Year’s Eve without snow

Can’t help sorrow for them
These beautiful scenes
Will not stay in their memories

Can’t help being thankful for them
These beautiful scenes
Will not stay in their memories

entry.title: Alive
entry.content:
Snow outside the window
She is sitting on the toilet
Constipation as always
Then send him a message

what are you doing?

Alive. . .
Let’s make a location sharing
Well, it seems to be a bit far away
Okay? More than 10,000 kilometers

Dreaming and dreaming last night was so hard, she wrote blankly
Dreaming of you, you came to see me and brought your wife, like Xiaoqian (read Xī), I don’t know why I work in a school.
It turned out to meet so calmly, you are like my old friend, I smile and listen to you.
She was white, thin, shoulder-length yellow hair, southerner, very polite, very likable girl.
The bell rang, I said I was going to class, and said goodbye in a hurry.
Later I found out that the ringtone was my alarm, and everything was a fantasy.

You can finally write a novel, he replied
Well, I often think of you recently
Me too, I kind of miss those days

Very far away, right?

She looked at the screen and smiled, turned her head and looked at the snow outside the window
It seems to have seen the half year ten years ago
Those pictures don’t seem to be my own experience
But the plot on TV

She rubbed her eyes

Then you continue to live well, she can’t see the screen clearly after saying this
Ok
I did not go to your wedding. If there is a funeral in the future, remember to ask my family to invite me. There are some word, I still want to tell you in person
Um i got it

entry.title: Milk powder
entry.content:
There is a shop on Old Gulou Street
Called milk powder
It’s a dessert shop

2007
He and her often go
At that time, the store put a lot of pens on the table
So that customers can write on the wall

They wrote a lot
Also read a lot of other people’s writing

Half a year later
When they go again
The milk powder has been redecorated
There are no words on the wall
At that time he smiled and told her
look
What’s the use of writing

The store said
We will take pictures of the wall before we renovate
For the convenience of friends
Come back to find the memories of the past

He ridicule
Who will come to find memory
Don’t look for those who didn’t break up
Won’t come after a breakup

Some day after 10 years
He called to milk powder
Ask if you have any photos from 10 years ago

entry.title: On the way
entry.content:
on the way

I really enjoy putting all my belongings in the car and moving, and I feel free and carefree.

I have traveled many times in Beijing, Hong Kong and Macao. Every time, from day to night, from scorching heat to severe winter, there are many fascinating points of long-distance high-speed. Every time I pass the brush, I will have a different experience. This brush itself has a special mood, so The experience is even more different.

Sometimes you will find that some cars are speeding, overloading, merging chaotically, taking emergency passages, driving high beams, especially unruly. Generally, such cars are divided into two categories, one is a foreign car, and you will leave after the gun. One is the local car, the relationship is harder than the rules.

Sometimes you are in a hurry, but the high speed is usually two-lane. Once there is a large truck in front of overtaking, there will be a long string of traffic. You have to slow down and wait for him to go before you go. It’s very helpless, but It can only be accepted.

Sometimes you are highly concentrated and shuttle between two lanes, and finally you find that the one who walks in the same lane honestly is still in front of you.

Sometimes you will find cars all over the world, so irritable that you want to set up a bazooka to blow up all the cars around you.

Sometimes you will find that there is no car around, especially from 2 am to 5 am. You will be very happy at first, but gradually you will feel fear, fear, and worry until there is a idiot behind you. With the high beam getting closer and closer, you realize that you are still alive, so you will be pleased and happy to see him, and then you will wait for him to pass, and then turn on the high beam to chase him, fun.

Sometimes you will compete with the same car to see who drove more elegantly, and then he will leave you in the middle, honking the whistle to say goodbye.

Sometimes a car on the same road will squeeze you into a dead end for petty gain. You are so annoyed that you can kill him, but after a turn, you still go around and find that he has broken down in the middle of the road.

Sometimes you will find that most of the cars with far-reaching goals will be more calm, and will be more humble when encountering problems, and will not compete for immediate success or failure.

Sometimes people who get off the road may be farther than your destination. They just don’t follow you anymore.

Sometimes new vehicles will come in, some are just on the road, and some are cars with stories. Whether they leave or just arrived, they have their own stories. Whether they stop or go, they are all independent There is no sense of good or bad in your life.

Sometimes leaving is the beginning.

The flag waver on Junshan Bridge

Passing by the Junshan Bridge, construction is underway on the bridge. In order to avoid passing vehicles that are too fast to merge, an uncle stood at the head of the bridge and waved the flag. The flag was 3 meters high, red and very bright; the flagpole was pure wood and very heavy; the bridge was windy and very strong. It was cold, his face flushed, his arms swayed hard, his eyes were blurred and his nose was running wild. He just stood there all the time, waving the flag.

entry.title: Impressions of Hangzhou
entry.content:
I have many opportunities to come to Hangzhou
But I have been reluctant to come
Because I’m afraid of being obsessed with her
So that you can’t live in other cities

It’s like if your first RPG game is Legend of Sword and Fairy
Your first online game is World of Warcraft
Then you will be tasteless when you play other games…

If not for this business trip
I don’t think I will come here in my life
I’m afraid it will ruin her impression in my heart
I’m even more afraid that I can’t live without her

Fortunately
She didn’t disappoint me at all
Unfortunately
I fell in love with her all of a sudden

Hangzhou
I agree with it everywhere
Culture, food, humanities
And that fascinating landscape

Let alone the well-known West Lake
Walk a random street in the old town
Even if it is an industrial zone
The bulletin boards on the roadside all contain elements of Chinese style, and there will be all kinds of rocks on the corner of the grass.
Even outside the door of an industrial design institute, they grow bamboo
As long as you pay attention, there are scenery everywhere

There is a small bar downstairs in the hotel where I live
This is not a tourist area
Very different from Shanghai
There is a mixture of Chinese and English, you look as if she is Chinese, not an exotic product

We often say
The biggest feature of the Chinese is the national melting pot
He will tolerate and assimilate foreign cultures
And what I saw in other cities can only be said to be Chinese-style Westernization
In Hangzhou, it’s a thorough integration.

Hangzhou traditional dishes
It came from Kaifeng at a glance
Xiaolongbao, cat ears, small wontons
And Henan and Shandong restaurants everywhere

Hangzhou is in the same line as Shanxi and Henan
Mainly pasta
Hasn’t changed in a thousand years

Hangzhou women have the sophistication of Shanghai women
With the boldness of a woman from the Central Plains
Woman passing by on the street
Wear two more tops and bottoms. A short top is called neon. Jeans are rarely seen on the lower body. Most of them are cloth skirts and gauze skirts, which are called clothes

There are a lot of people showing their belly
But don’t show your belly button
You don’t seem to think they dress up like this to attract the eyes of the opposite sex
But I think it should be dressed like this here

Rarely, Hangzhou women are amazing at first sight
More of it is that you look at her walking past as if you have blended into the scenery
As elegant, chic and beautiful as Hangzhou

白蘋紅蓼西風裡 一色湖光萬頃秋

It takes early morning to go to West Lake, there are few people
Set foot on Beishan Road at 6 o’clock
Watching the sun gradually rise
Feel the lake breeze on your face
Listen to the birds chirping
Smell the fragrance of sweet-scented osmanthus
If the lake is foggy, you will want to blend in here

Compared with the pavilions in West Lake
I prefer the quietness of Lingyin
The winding road extends up the mountain
Both sides of the mountain road are full of tea trees
Every turn is an ingenuity
The more you go up the mountain, the stronger the fragrance of osmanthus
The more you go to the mountains, the less distracting thoughts in your heart will be.
I have turned the mountain road ten times, and I also have the urge to stay here ten times

Rent a yard, it doesn’t need to be big
Make a pot of tea without thickening
Entertain guests and friends, not much
Keep a dog, don’t have to be expensive
Stay with your parents, watch your children, and live your life like this with your wife.

俺曾見，金陵玉樹鶯聲曉，秦淮水榭花開早，誰知道容易冰消。眼看他起朱樓，眼看他宴賓客，眼看他樓塌了，落個白茫茫大地真乾淨！

鳳凰山，伏梟鳥，孤山夢最真，舊境丟難掉。不如這輿圖換掉，謅一曲江南好，放笑聲唱到老。

entry.title: Raving
entry.content:
What I miss is not our tacit smile while looking at each other, what I miss is not a hug, what I miss is not the breath of rushing into the sky in the dark, what I miss is actually on the balcony in Shenzhen, for the first time Calling you that unfamiliar talk, n73 is already hot enough to cook my ears, I’m afraid my ears will be cooked by the hot contact when I hit them, but I still refuse to put down the phone, flick the phone to continue the conversation, I What I miss, in fact, is faint, original, that kind of taste…

Every time I get a headache or upset because of my relationship, I think of that night, your sentence, why don’t you call me? It’s like a bird in the woods, and it’s like the bright clouds in the morning, crisp and thorough. , Cool and comfortable~
The rock-solid relationship is the one I miss… the trip to Shenzhen… the covenant made on the balcony~

200802132116

entry.title: Father's son
entry.content:
陟彼岵兮，瞻望父兮。父曰：嗟！予子行役，夙夜无已。上慎旃哉！犹来无止！

Recently we often talk
Although every time it ends with a dispute

Until now I still think
He objected to all my views that did not fit his ideas
I am still impressed

Maybe it’s the N+1th time he mentioned his thoughts on my future
As long as a peaceful life is satisfied
I laughed inside as always
The future I want is not the lake but the ocean

I suddenly learned that he has dyed his hair for many years
To my impression he can still lift me above the giant
But I don’t know me who never dared to speak loudly in front of him before
I can also roar loudly

When he faced my roar
When he can calmly reason
I found his gray hair
It’s too much to hide

But I still talk about my ideals willfully
Somewhat ridiculous
Somewhat ridiculous

When i found out
The fear he can’t hide
When I’m afraid I can’t help me anymore
In a way of negating my point of view over and over again
To prove his authority

When i’m the same
When I feel unreasonable
I don’t know some where in my heart
Pain like cramping

entry.title: Consciousness | Sharo Double Tree Garden
entry.content:
*** —Written in the summer of 1997, written for Saint Seiya Nakasaka in Saro Double Tree Garden***

花が咲き、そして散る。星が辉き、いつか消える。この地球も、太阳、银河系、そして大きな宇宙さえもいつかは死する时が来る。人间の一瞬などそれらに比べれば瞬きほどのわずかなものであろう。そのわずかな一时に、人はうまれ、笑い、涙、闘い、伤つき、喜び、悲しみ、谁かを憎み、谁かを爱し。すべては刹那の邂逅。そして谁かも死という永远の眠りに包まれる

The earth, the sun, and even the entire universe will have a day of death. Life and these scores are just a short moment. In this moment, smiling, crying, struggling, hurt, happy, sad, who you like, who you hate, Everything is a short meet, no one can escape eternal sleep.

Rather than crying, hurting, sad, hating, I would rather smile, struggle, be happy, and like. Everything we encounter in this short moment, no matter good or bad, will not change because of our emotions. Therefore, I choose to face it happily and enjoy this moment full of joy, and when you start to enjoy some, you will find that all bad things have changed.
